# Heartopia Hub

> Your cozy companion for all things Heartopia. Discover, learn, and connect with fellow adventurers.

## Key Information
- **Heartopia**: A cozy, 3D open-world life simulator blending charm with modern social features.
- **Hobby Systems**: Fishing, Cooking, Building, and Socializing are core gameplay pillars.
- **Support**: Available on Mobile (Play Store), with detailed status for PC and Nintendo Switch.

## Guides
- [Fishing Guide](https://theheartopia.com/en/fishing): Master rare catches and secret fishing spots.
- [Fish Locations](https://theheartopia.com/en/guides/fish-locations): Complete tracker for all fish in Heartopia.
- [Cooking Recipes](https://theheartopia.com/en/guides/heartopia-recipes-cooking-guide): All formulas for cooking and baking.
- [House Ideas & Blueprints](https://theheartopia.com/en/guides/housing): Design your dream island paradise.
- [Piano Guide](https://theheartopia.com/en/piano): Master the piano and collect music sheets.

## Events
- [Onsen Egg Quest](https://theheartopia.com/en/events/onsen-egg): Complete daily egg locations tracker.
- [Meteor Shower](https://theheartopia.com/en/events/meteor-shower): Guide to wishing on stars.
- [Aurora Banquet](https://theheartopia.com/en/events/heartopia-aurora-weather-banquet-guide): Seasonal winter festival guide.

## Platforms
- [PC / Windows Status](https://theheartopia.com/en/platforms/pc)
- [Android / Play Store](https://theheartopia.com/en/platforms/play-store)
- [Nintendo Switch Status](https://theheartopia.com/en/platforms/switch)
- [Official Release Date](https://theheartopia.com/en/release-date)

## NPCs
- [NPC Directory](https://theheartopia.com/en/npcs): Meet characters like Doris, Vanya, and Blanc.
- [Where is Doris?](https://theheartopia.com/en/where-is-doris): Real-time location guide for Doris.
